completed_tasks.name: Phase-8 real-LLM batch on cbb6c5e — Stage 1 PASSED, Stage 2 10/20 done, SIGTERM at STOP B (zero trials)
25 personalization angles derived bottom-up from 11 user payloads
Root cause: dag_runner.py:84 skill_bundle="SKILL_BODY" literal — 3 production nodes naked
Root cause: copy_payload_for strips user_state; cache_miss=120 tokens at copy_generation
Delta mechanism redesign: orphan map of 06-02 functions + 6 gap-closure plans 09-01..09-06 with real bandit / Wilson LCB / journal-then-fold / paired-control uplift

remaining_tasks.name: SKILL loader unification — single harness primitive (the binding to fixed nodes is an extension class/hook, NOT hardcoded in dag_runner)
Context disclosure boundary research + fix — copy_payload_for / rubric_payload_for; treat as information-theoretic problem (cache-hit vs information density), not blanket whitelist
Distill-skill-deltas dual-track success/failure mining + target_skill format contract (3 sites)
Replace deterministic loop with select_trial_delta + ProductionSignalWindow + paired control + journal-then-fold (F-08-D 09-01..09-05 condensed into phase-8 gap-closure)
Re-run real-LLM batch — Stage 1 + Stage 2 + Stage 3 (Stage 3 c=20 is closest to production; one-shot validation of all fixes)

blockers.description: F-08-B (dag_runner SKILL loader missing) blocks the entire pipeline — no skill prose reaches LLM nodes. Must fix before any further evolution work has signal.
blockers.workaround: 08-G1 fix lifts this; F-08-A/C/D all become actionable after 08-G1 lands.

blockers.description: F-08-C (copy_payload_for strips user_state) compounds with F-08-B — even with SKILL prose, copy node sees only 120 tokens of new info. Must NOT be solved by blanket whitelist; treat as cache-density problem.

human_actions_pending.action: Confirm 08-G1 / 08-G2 design before implementation begins (loader shape; context disclosure boundary research outcome).
human_actions_pending.context: User explicitly said skills loader must be a single harness primitive (NOT hardcoded), context disclosure must research cache-hit vs information density before writing the fix.

decisions.decision: Gap-closure stays inside phase 08, no phase 09. Findings F-08-A..D drive 08-G1..G5 work.
decisions.rationale: User explicit: "不要开 phase 9，就在这个 phase 解决".

decisions.decision: SKILL loader is a single harness primitive; the binding from fixed nodes to fixed skills is implemented as an extension class or hook on top of that primitive — not hardcoded literals.
decisions.rationale: User explicit: "skills loader 的机制必须统一为一个，我们所有的扩展都建立在基础的 harness 基建上".

decisions.decision: Context disclosure (F-08-C fix) is an information-theoretic problem; before writing code, research the cache-hit / information-density boundary. Do not blanket-pass user_state.
decisions.rationale: User explicit: "context 的披露是不是可以仔细研究一下，可能和缓存命中也相关，信息量上过多或者少都是不可取的".

decisions.decision: SKILL prose must NOT contain the user's examples or analogies; instead the agent re-expresses the user's intent in unified, fluent terminology.
decisions.rationale: User explicit: "切忌在设计 skills 时把举例和比方写进去，正确做法是你理解我的意图随后用你认为更统一和通顺的词汇和说法来构筑".

decisions.decision: After fixes land, re-run real-LLM directly to Stage 3 (skip dedicated stage-1/2 re-validation runs; Stage 3 c=20 is closest to production and validates all fixes one-shot).
decisions.rationale: User explicit: "修复后直接跑 stage3，因为 stage3 是最接近生产实际的情景，可以一次性检验所有问题".

decisions.decision: Subagent dispatch for gap-closure execution must use opus / xhigh reasoning intensity.
decisions.rationale: User explicit: "按照 skills 需求派发 subagent 时应注意推理强度为 xhigh". model="claude-opus-4-7" passed to Agent() calls.

decisions.decision: GSD orchestration drives this work — main agent orchestrates, dispatches gsd-* subagents per skill needs, runs end-to-end without stopping until Stage 3 batch completes.
decisions.rationale: User explicit: "按照 gsd 的流程来做这些事... 不要停止，直到 stage3 跑完".

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 08 --gaps with findings F-08-A..D as input. Planner reads .planning/phases/08-evolution-wiring-and-runner-debt/findings/F-08-{A,B,C,D}*.md and produces 08-G1..G5 gap-closure plans. Then /gsd-execute-phase 08 --gaps-only with model=opus on subagents. After implementation lands and pytest is green, launch real-LLM batch directly to Stage 3.
context_notes: Phase 8 is a runner-touch sweep that turned into a deeper investigation. The key shift: I previously saw F-08-01 (delta wiring broken) as the issue, but parallel investigations B/C/D showed F-08-01 is the symptom. F-08-B (LLM naked, no SKILL prose) is the deepest root cause — every observation about template copy, factor bimodality, low diversity flows from production nodes receiving 10-byte 'SKILL_BODY' literal instead of skill prose. F-08-C compounds it (no user_state at copy node). Once both fix, F-08-A's 25 angles become reachable and F-08-D's bandit/uplift mechanism has clean signal to work on. Don't fall into surface-patching — each fix must be at the architectural seam, not the line that raised the symptom. SKILL prose rewrite must use unified terminology, never the user's example phrases verbatim. Stage 3 c=20 batch is the acceptance gate.
